description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual summer attire, featuring a sleeveless tank top and knee-length shorts. The figure has a well-defined, athletic build and stands with arms extended horizontally to the sides. He wears low-top sneakers and has a modern, short hairstyle with the sides trimmed and the top styled upward. The clothing fits loosely, with the tank top slightly wrinkled and the shorts featuring visible pockets and seams. The figure's facial features are neutral, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a sleeveless tank top, knee-length shorts, sneakers, and a modern short hairstyle, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has an athletic build and a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tank top, shorts, sneakers, and the figure's facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the tank top, and the side seam of the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tank top, shorts, and hairstyle, with both arms fully visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, arm, and the side details of the shorts and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless tank top and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, styled upward with trimmed sides
